overall.description: First-person driving gameplay through a futuristic cyberpunk city during a heavy rainstorm. The player navigates through neon-lit urban streets, intersections, and highways in a vehicle, passing other cars and commercial billboards. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-quality cinematic graphics featuring reflective wet roads and dense neon signage.

exits covered highway structure into open urban intersection with crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins driving under a covered highway structure during heavy rainfall, illuminated by cyan and red neon strips. The vehicle follows a white sedan through the sheltered roadway before making a sharp right turn around 7.5 seconds, exiting the covered area into an open intersection with visible crosswalk markings.

multi-story buildings with glass windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Driving through open urban intersections exposed to heavy rain, crossing distinctive yellow-striped crosswalks. The 'All Foods' billboard becomes visible on the left as the vehicle proceeds through the commercial district, with scattered pedestrians visible on sidewalks and other vehicles navigating the wet streets.

turning right and transitioning from dense commercial area to highway entrance ramp

agents.ego_description: following a red sports car through the commercial district, maintaining steady speed through wet streets and navigating turns

multiple illuminated billboards and building-mounted digital screens displaying advertisements
metal guardrails separating the road from sidewalks and pedestrian areas

segments.scene_description: The vehicle follows a red sports car through the neon-lit commercial district, passing multiple digital advertising screens mounted on buildings. The road is wet with visible reflections of neon lights. Around 40 seconds, the scene transitions as the vehicle turns toward a highway entrance, leaving the dense commercial building facades behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with guardrails and rocky terrain

transitioning from urban buildings to natural rocky hillside surroundings with sparse vegetation

agents.ego_description: driving on elevated highway with curves, passing through sections with rocky terrain and guardrails visible on both sides

natural rock formation with sparse vegetation visible beyond the guardrail
concrete overpass and support structures ahead with directional signage
overhead directional signs with illuminated text and arrows

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated highway with prominent yellow and black striped guardrails, the environment shifts from urban to natural as rocky hillsides become visible on both sides. The road curves continuously through the rainy night, with the vehicle following a green car ahead. The dense neon and billboards of the city are replaced by sparse vegetation and concrete highway structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from the sheltered, neon-lit corridors of a cyberpunk city into the open, rainy expanse of a coastal highway. It begins under a covered highway structure illuminated by cyan and red neon strips, following a white sedan before making a sharp right turn into an open intersection. As the vehicle proceeds through the commercial district, the scene opens up to reveal yellow-striped crosswalks and a prominent All Foods billboard amidst heavy rain and scattered pedestrians. The camera then follows a red sports car past towering digital advertising screens and reflective wet roads before turning away from the dense building facades toward a highway entrance. Finally, the environment shifts from urban neon to a natural landscape as the vehicle follows a green car along an elevated highway, passing yellow and black guardrails and rocky hillsides under the rainy night sky.
